name: Glen Eagle Resources Inc.
summary: Glen Eagle Resources Inc. in the acquisition, exploration, evaluation, and development of mining properties. The company holds a 100% interest in the Moose Lake phosphate property located in St-Jean Lake area, Quebec, Canada; the La Cobra property with one claim covering approximately 775 hectares located in the Valle Department, Hondura, as well as Piedra Dorada mining concession located in the rich mining district of El Corpus in Honduras. It is also involved in the recovery of gold and silver from tailings; and recovery of gold from rocks. The company was formerly known as Temoris Resources Inc. and changed its name to Glen Eagle Resources Inc. in September 2008. Glen Eagle Resources Inc. is headquartered in Montreal, Canada.
